name: Daily Weather Report
description: Runs every morning on a schedule and sends a daily weather summary email using the MSN Weather connector.

body.Subject: Daily Weather Report - @{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'MMMM d, yyyy')}
body.Body:
Good morning! Here is your weather report for {{LOCATION}}.

Current Conditions: @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['cap']}

Temperature: @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['temp']}°F (Feels like @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['feels']}°F)

Humidity: @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['humidity']}%

Wind: @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['windSpd']} mph @{body('Get_current_weather')?['responses']?['weather']?[0]?['current']?['windDir']}

Have a great day!

notes: Replace {{RECIPIENT_EMAIL}} with the email address to send the report to.
Adjust the recurrence schedule and time zone as needed.
